name: Fozayel Ibn Ayaz
title: Infrastructure Strategist · Data Analyst · Front-End Focused Developer · Digital Marketing & Operations Support
headline: I build stable systems, clear dashboards, SEO-ready web pages, marketing workflows, support operations, and fast interfaces that feel precise from the first click.
summary: I work across infrastructure, web development, analytics, marketing, automation, and virtual operations. My strength is connecting dependable systems with practical business outcomes: secure IT operations, fast WordPress/WooCommerce builds, SEO and content support, social/email campaigns, customer support workflows, marketplace VA tasks, real-time dashboards, and machine-learning workflows that turn raw numbers into decisions.

experience.summary: Converting custom HTML into scalable WordPress systems with technical SEO, clean content architecture, and performance-led front-end delivery.
points: Built flexible WordPress architectures using ACF, Custom Post Types, and reusable content structures.
Implemented JSON-LD schema, semantic HTML5, and technical SEO improvements for competitive service pages.
Optimized Core Web Vitals with image compression, lazy loading, CSS refinement, and mobile-first QA.
Managed cross-browser testing, Rich Results validation, release checks, and deployment quality control.

experience.summary: Managing company technology, platform stability, access control, and WordPress delivery for business-critical web properties.
points: Delivered three priority WordPress properties from requirements to production deployment.
Strengthened website security, performance, reliability, and content delivery workflows.
Resolved complex hardware, software, and network issues for remote teams.
Managed user credentials, email provisioning, access control, and new technical solutions.

experience.summary: Building reporting systems and dashboards that make marketing, product, and revenue performance easier to read and act on.
points: Tracked platform performance with GA4, Google Tag Manager, YouTube Analytics, and internal dashboards.
Built Looker Studio dashboards for subscriber growth, conversion rates, user minutes, retention, and revenue trends.
Maintained event tracking, custom triggers, and conversion tags for accurate behavioral data.
Translated complex analytics into clear actions for business and marketing teams.

experience.summary: Supported infrastructure reliability through hardware, software, network, and application troubleshooting.
points: Installed and configured hardware, software, networks, and business applications.
Diagnosed system and network issues and communicated clear solutions to staff and clients.
Monitored systems for uptime, performance, and continuity.
Documented fixes and supported new application deployment.

experience.summary: Taught programming foundations to young learners while tailoring lessons to individual goals.
points: Taught coding and computer applications to 4th and 5th-grade students.
Created customized learning paths and provided one-to-one support.
Tracked student progress and supported course enrollment growth.

experience.summary: Handled data processing work with accuracy, validation, and operational discipline.
points: Executed data-entry and data-processing tasks with quality control.
Validated and manipulated data to protect accuracy and integrity.
Supported workflow improvements and operational efficiency.

education.degree: BSc in Computer Science and Engineering

projects.name: Real-Time Product Management Dashboard
projects.summary: A live product-management interface built with Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, and Firebase. Product updates appear instantly, while the dashboard tracks active and inactive inventory through real-time visual feedback.

projects.name: Works Lover E-commerce Platform
projects.summary: A full WooCommerce delivery covering setup, custom site design, deployment, security, performance tuning, product structure, and storefront management for fashion and accessories categories.

projects.name: Time-Series Forecasting: Stock Prices
projects.summary: A forecasting project comparing ARIMA, Prophet, and LSTM on historical stock-price data with rolling-window evaluation and performance metrics including RMSE and MAPE.

projects.name: Smart Health Consulting System
projects.summary: A health-consulting application designed to offer preliminary guidance from patient-reported symptoms and support a faster first layer of decision-making.

projects.name: Unreal Engine Pixel Streaming Deployment
projects.summary: An end-to-end vehicle simulation delivered with Unreal Engine Pixel Streaming and E3DS deployment, including real-time directional controls and browser-based access.

projects.name: Bus Ticket Counter System
projects.summary: A Java-based ticket-counter system that models the business logic of ticketing operations, including transaction flow and counter-level workflow.
